case_title: JIN YUN ZHAO VS. KANG HO JIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-03-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ARASH YASREBI, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-14-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-29-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-20-2019 CONTINUED TO APR-03-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-14-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-16-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). *** NOTE: THIS CASE IS SUBJECT TO DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B) IF THERE IS NO APPEARANCE ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE AND COMPLIANCE. *** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, JIN YUN AS TO DEFENDANT JIN, KANG HO CARLOS MAURICIO, MANILA BUENDIA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-20-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-19-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-28-2019

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-16-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ARASH YASREBI, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-16-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, JIN YUN
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Continued To Sep-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-17-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. *** NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. *** JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-16-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
